review.evidence: The initial full-suite timeout left no failed assertion and the owned process tree exited naturally. The exact npm test command was rerun with a wider wrapper window and passed 176/176 runnable tests. Registry imports remain declaration/validation-only; no state, effect, control-plane, runtime, or MCP transport authority was introduced.

obligation_evidence.evidence: The registry declares and validates operations only; it imports no control-plane, runtime, state, or transport module and creates no second lifecycle authority.
The manifest/catalog caps Agent risk at low and lists only the approved local first-release operations.
agentProtocol and cliSchema are independent compatibility axes, and MCP provenance permits cliSchemaVersion=null while CLI remains version 1.
Definitions carry declarative risk/schema metadata only; no host annotation or adapter input authorizes effects.
assessCompatibility computes every read/write axis independently and returns canWrite=false/diagnosticOnly=true on mismatch.
Compatibility uses explicit version ranges and component digests rather than package version or path alone.
The exact result schema requires surface, host, runtime kind/version/path, state home, build identity, Agent protocol, and CLI schema provenance.
Strict Zod inputs reject command/cwd/env/force/path and unknown fields recursively.
risk, approval, confirmation, and equivalent caller fields are not accepted by any public request schema.
AgentOperationResult validation and normalization keep outcome.kind distinct from resource.status.
Fourteen named compatibility axes prevent package, protocol, CLI, state, catalog, Skill, and host versions from collapsing.

Manifest buildIdentity is canonical and non-self-referential; registry/schema/Skill/compatibility component digests are independently recorded. Runtime/host digest entries are prebuild sentinels and make no readiness claim.
Host artifact metadata is restricted to artifact ID, manifest version, and integrity digest; recursive policy/state/authorization negatives pass.

recovery.action: Waited for the owned test process tree to exit naturally, verified no repository test process remained, then reran the same npm test command with a wider external wrapper window.
